decisions.rationale: Schema-first with code generation. 10.7k stars, actively maintained, built-in subscriptions and dataloaders. Best Go GraphQL lib for type safety and ecosystem.
Code-first entity schema, auto migrations, type-safe queries, integrates with gqlgen via entgql extension. Generates both DB models and GraphQL types from one source.
Full-featured relational DB. Best for double-entry accounting with referential integrity, aggregation queries for reports.
Stateless access tokens for API. HTTP-only cookie refresh tokens. Standard for SPA + GraphQL.
Largest ecosystem, best GraphQL client support (Apollo/urql), TypeScript for type safety across the stack.

decisions.decision: KES (Kenya Shilling) as base currency, single currency for MVP
decisions.rationale: Primary user base. Multi-currency deferred to post-MVP.
KES 1,500.50 stored as 150050. No floating point errors. Standard practice for financial applications.

decisions.decision: Double-entry ledger, hidden behind simple UX
decisions.rationale: User adds expenses/income through simple forms. Backend creates balanced journal entries. Gives consistent balances, audit trails, and extensibility without exposing complexity.

decisions.decision: Detailed hierarchical with Kenyan household presets
decisions.rationale: Ship with: Food (Groceries/Eating Out/Market), Transport (Matatu/Uber/Fuel), Rent, Utilities (KPLC/Water/Internet), Airtime & Data, Healthcare, Education, Entertainment, Shopping, Savings. Users can customize.
All income flows into the household. All expenses draw from it. Members see a unified view. Not Splitwise-style debt tracking.

decisions.decision: Manual entry + CSV import for MVP
decisions.rationale: Manual quick-add for daily expenses. CSV import for bulk bank statement ingestion with configurable column mapping.
Containerize from start. Pick cloud platform (Fly.io, Railway, AWS) later.

constraints: Go backend (stdlib-first where possible, ent/gqlgen for data/API)
Manual entry + CSV import for MVP
Double-entry ledger hidden behind simple UX
openQuestions: React GraphQL client: Apollo Client vs urql vs Relay?
CSS framework: Tailwind CSS vs Chakra UI vs shadcn/ui?
CSV column mapping UX — wizard vs drag-and-drop?
Household invite flow — email link vs invite code?
Budget rollover behavior — carry forward or reset monthly?
